title: The Mystery of the Second Cross in 30
display_title: The Mystery of the Second Cross in 30
wikitext:
[]: The Mystery of the Second Cross in 3.0             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Jan 10, 2020 6:32 pm While we were brainstorming the Children = Adams theory, Reichu noticed something very interesting in Eva 3.0. This bloody cross laying among the sea of skulls in Central Dogma? SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: The Mystery of the Second Cross in 3.0             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 10, 2020 9:40 pm Wow, one of those details that multiple watchings didn't really "click" with me, but this certainly makes a heck of a lot of sense. Thanks for the excellent write-up!

[]: Re: The Mystery of the Second Cross in 3.0             Quote Post by Settie » Fri Jan 10, 2020 10:28 pm I'm not sure how this is a mystery. If memory serves we don't actually know the "size" of lillith and its cross. As the few shots of lillith don't have good reference to asses size. Plus even if lillith was eva size, there's still the fact that the spears don't actually have set size, since a quick google search shows that the spears dwarfed eva 13 when they were impaling lillith/mark 6. I'm gonna go with the likelyhood that that "second" cross is lilliths cross that grew alongside it when it ballooned up in size, like the spears did.

[]: Re: The Mystery of the Second Cross in 3.0             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 10, 2020 11:27 pm I'm pretty sure I'm the originator of the "Rei clone in an Eva gets eaten by 12th Angel and that's how Lilith got Rei-looking" idea that BlueBasilisk mentions in his write-up. (Closest I can pinpoint the original source is somewhere in the Impact Mechanics thread during 2013.) It was the best I could come up with previously, since it's easy to interpret the shot of Lilith in Ha as confirming that N3I has no effect on her, therefore ruling out (seemingly) the notion that she turned into a giant Rei then. The jumbo cross changed the game promptly, and things are much tidier for it. It never DID make sense why the 12th Angel became Rei-ish when exposed to Lilith's body fluid, if it had been the very thing to bring the Rei influence to Lilith in the first place! SSD : We didn't actually notice it until I increased the gamma on this shot for completely unrelated reasons (I was trying to make the polygons in the back pop more), and then it became obvious that the cross' furrow was in the completely "wrong" place. It all snowballed from there. Settie: The spears get longer when they're impaling Lilith and 06, but they retain the same girth. So the Spear does indeed provide a proper scale for Lilith in Jo and Ha: Lilith's own hands would comfortably wrap around the shaft, therefore she is about Eva-sized.

[]: Re: The Mystery of the Second Cross in 3.0             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Jan 11, 2020 1:53 am My gut reaction was "it's for dramatic effect", but it does seem like this actually is intentional. Great find. Never noticed it in 7 years.

[]: Re: The Mystery of the Second Cross in 3.0             Quote Post by Settie » Sat Jan 11, 2020 6:33 pm Reichu wrote: Settie: The spears get longer when they're impaling Lilith and 06, but they retain the same girth. So the Spear does indeed provide a proper scale for Lilith in Jo and Ha: Lilith's own hands would comfortably wrap around the shaft, therefore she is about Eva-sized.

[]: Re: The Mystery of the Second Cross in 3.0             Quote Post by Evil Doge » Sun Jan 12, 2020 1:56 am This make me think... It could be that the Rei Ayanami faces were there because someone in NERV extracted Rei from EVA-01, leaving Shinji there cause in that moment he would be useless. With that idea on mind, Rei Ayanami was used to complete the Third Impact: + Rei (Lilith's soul) + Lilith (body) + Eva Mark.06 (Adam's body) + 12th Angel (as a subtitute to Adam's soul) = Third Impact In that impact, as the same of The End of Evangelion, Lilith take de form of Rei Ayanami but a lot more bigger. And, in some point of this process, the Third Impact was stopped by the two Longinus Spears (or Longinus and Cassius) putting it, again, in pause. That means Rei 02 was kept trapped in Lilith's body from 14 years and, probably, we saw her die by the 12th angel and Unit 13 in 3.0.

[]: Re: The Mystery of the Second Cross in 3.0             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Jan 12, 2020 12:08 pm ^ That's been considered in the past. The biggest issue with the idea is that Fuyutsuki tells us that the Rei Ayanami Shinji knows (meaning Rei II specifically) is still safely stored "within the system" of Unit 01 per Gendo's plans and he's the best authority we have on the matter at present. Rei Q shows that Lilith wouldn't necessarily need a soul in her body to be up doing things. Settie wrote: That's actually incorrect, just did a double check on the screenshot that popped up on google search and indeed the spears do change size. It comes as a weird ironic twist that the proof came from these forums and specifically from you . As you can see unless there's some hankyness going on, those spears fit the hands of the giant version of the mark 6. Unit 13 looks tiny next to mark 6s arms and hands and the spears. So it's more likely that the size of the spears and cross aren't an indicative of something but rather to make the shots look better and more consistent. Otherwise the mark 6 would have baby hands or unit 13 massive ones.
